case_title: RIVERA ALMA VS ENWERE M.O. PARTNER OF SIBA AND ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY RIVERA ALMA AS TO DEFENDANT ENWERE M.O. PARTNER OF SIBA AND ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
